description: Create a scheduled GitHub Actions workflow named Test: feature that runs every Saturday at 16:00. The workflow should also be manually dispatchable. It uses an ubuntu-latest job matrix with a single mode (release) and 20 splits (0-19). For each split, it checks out two repositories (omnetpp and inet) into separate paths, restores a ccache, installs dependencies, builds and tests the feature, and uploads the test log as an artifact.
